analysis.summary: A sensual yet melancholic reggaeton anthem where a female protagonist answers twenty-three questions from an ex-lover by firmly declaring her emotional closure and refusal to return.

sections.name: Intro
sections.emotion: Intimate reflection with dark nostalgia, intimate phone-call texture.
sections.imageryPrompt: A dimly lit room at night illuminated only by the blue glow of an old smartphone screen reflecting in eyes filled with quiet sadness.

sections.name: Verse 1
sections.emotion: Melancholic realization and gentle firmness, smooth melodic flow.
sections.imageryPrompt: Raindrops sliding down a window pane while shadows of two figures fade apart on the glass.

sections.name: Pre-Chorus
sections.emotion: Building emotional tension and defensive resolve.
sections.imageryPrompt: A golden key turning in a lock while heavy storm clouds gather outside the window.

sections.name: Chorus
sections.emotion: Triumphant closure and wide atmospheric release.
sections.imageryPrompt: A vast open ocean at twilight where a lone boat sails away leaving no wake behind.

sections.name: Post-Chorus
sections.emotion: Sensual lingering pain and rhythmic repetition.
sections.imageryPrompt: Close up of a hand gently closing a heavy wooden door with sound waves rippling through the air.

sections.name: Verse 2
sections.emotion: Narrative storytelling and deep emotional counting.
sections.imageryPrompt: An open book with handwritten numbers fading into smoke that forms the shape of a heart breaking.

sections.name: Pre-Chorus 2
sections.imageryPrompt: A sunrise breaking through thick storm clouds revealing a path of blooming wildflowers.

keywords.imageryPrompt: Dozens of glowing neon numbers floating in the air like fireflies that turn to ash upon touch.
A thick velvet curtain falling silently over a chaotic city street scene.
A scar glowing softly on skin that never fully fades but stops bleeding.

keywords.emotion: Displacement from safety to community belonging issues.
keywords.imageryPrompt: An angel standing in a cloud while looking down at a bustling village below refusing entry.

keywords.imagedPrompt: A brass key dropped on the floor of an empty room with dust motes dancing in shafts of light.

keywords.imageryPrompt: Soft white doves flying over a calm lake reflecting moonlight and starry skies.
